[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011001 4
1 0001010 2
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 1011001 4
5 0100100 2
6 0101001 3
7 1101101 5

01 10 1111101 6

70 07 1011011 5
